findings.title: npm vulnerability: @anthropic-ai/sdk
findings.description: Claude SDK for TypeScript: Memory Tool Path Validation Allows Sandbox Escape to Sibling Directories. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @chevrotain/cst-dts-gen
findings.description: @chevrotain/gast. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @chevrotain/gast
findings.description: lodash. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @hono/node-server
findings.description: @hono/node-server has authorization bypass for protected static paths via encoded slashes in Serve Static Middleware. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @mrleebo/prisma-ast
findings.description: chevrotain. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @prisma/config
findings.description: effect. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @prisma/dev
findings.description: @hono/node-server. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @storybook/nextjs
findings.description: node-polyfill-webpack-plugin. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @xmldom/xmldom
findings.description: xmldom: XML injection via unsafe CDATA serialization allows attacker-controlled markup insertion. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: axios
findings.description: Axios has a NO_PROXY Hostname Normalization Bypass Leads to SSRF. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: basic-ftp
findings.description: basic-ftp has FTP Command Injection via CRLF. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: brace-expansion
findings.description: brace-expansion: Zero-step sequence causes process hang and memory exhaustion. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: browserify-sign
findings.description: elliptic. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: chevrotain
findings.description: @chevrotain/cst-dts-gen. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: create-ecdh
findings.description: elliptic. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: crypto-browserify
findings.description: browserify-sign. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: defu
findings.description: defu: Prototype pollution via `__proto__` key in defaults argument. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: effect
findings.description: Effect `AsyncLocalStorage` context lost/contaminated inside Effect fibers under concurrent load with RPC. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: elliptic
findings.description: Elliptic Uses a Cryptographic Primitive with a Risky Implementation. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: handlebars
findings.description: Handlebars.js has JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion by tampering @partial-block. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: hono
findings.description: Hono vulnerable to XSS through ErrorBoundary component . Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: lodash
findings.description: Lodash has Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next
findings.description: Next.js has a Denial of Service with Server Components. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: node-polyfill-webpack-plugin
findings.description: crypto-browserify. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: nodemailer
findings.description: Nodemailer has SMTP command injection due to unsanitized `envelope.size` parameter. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: picomatch
findings.description: Picomatch: Method Injection in POSIX Character Classes causes incorrect Glob Matching. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: prisma
findings.description: @prisma/config. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: yaml
findings.description: yaml is vulnerable to Stack Overflow via deeply nested YAML collections. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.
